CVE-2024-52949.title: iptraf-ng 1.2.1 has a stack-based buffer overflow. In src/ifaces. ...
CVE-2024-52949.description: iptraf-ng 1.2.1 has a stack-based buffer overflow. In src/ifaces.c, the strcpy function consistently fails to control the size, and it is consequently possible to overflow memory on the stack.
